weaknesses.challenge: The current architecture shows no auto-scaling strategy. At 10x load, response times will breach SLA thresholds.

CHG-0003.proposal_preview: Build a public consumer SaaS marketplace for local organic produce, focusing on user acquisition and subscription models.

weaknesses.challenge: Single point of failure: only one engineer understands the core orchestration layer.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing team dependency.

weaknesses.challenge: The proposed feature set is table-stakes in the current market. No defensible IP or network effect is described.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing competitive moat.

weaknesses.challenge: No push notification or email drip campaign infrastructure is planned.
